arts.ttl: Chelsea boss welcomes ‘nice problem’ ahead of Brighton clash
arts.sum: CHelsea manager Enzo Maresca says it’s a “nice problem” to have so many attacking players in form ahead of their Premier League meeting with Brighton this weekend. Christopher Nkunku netted a hat-trick for the Blues as they beat Barrow 5-0 at Stamford Bridge on Tuesday night to progress to the next round of the League […] The post Chelsea boss welcomes ‘nice problem’ ahead of Brighton clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: 'Martin Zubimendi will be kicking himself over Liverpool – now he's fighting relegation'
